title: tectaria subglabra
intro: Tectaria subglabra is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical forests. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Tectaria subglabra include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Tinctures and infusions can be made from the plant's leaves to harness its medicinal properties.
